concepts.name: Differential Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation involving an unknown function and its derivatives.

concepts.name: Ordinary Differential Equation
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation involving only one independent variable.

concepts.name: Partial Differential Equation
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation involving multiple independent variables and their partial derivatives.

concepts.name: Order of DE
concepts.short_definition: The order of the highest derivative present in the differential equation.

concepts.name: Degree of DE
concepts.short_definition: The highest power of the highest order derivative after the equation is made polynomial in derivatives.

concepts.name: Linear DE
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation where the unknown function and its derivatives appear linearly.

concepts.name: Nonlinear DE
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation that is not linear.

concepts.name: Solution of DE
concepts.short_definition: A function that satisfies the differential equation.

concepts.name: General Solution
concepts.short_definition: A solution containing arbitrary constants, representing a family of solutions.

concepts.name: Particular Solution
concepts.short_definition: A specific solution obtained by assigning values to the arbitrary constants in the general solution.

concepts.name: Initial Condition
concepts.short_definition: A condition specifying the value of the unknown function or its derivatives at a particular point.

concepts.name: Initial Value Problem
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation with one or more initial conditions.

concepts.name: Boundary Condition
concepts.short_definition: A condition specifying the value of the unknown function or its derivatives at different points.

concepts.name: Boundary Value Problem
concepts.short_definition: A differential equation with one or more boundary conditions.

concepts.name: First Order DE
concepts.short_definition: An ordinary differential equation of the first order.

concepts.name: Second Order DE
concepts.short_definition: An ordinary differential equation of the second order.

concepts.name: Homogeneous DE
concepts.short_definition: A linear differential equation where the non-derivative terms are zero.

concepts.name: Non-homogeneous DE
concepts.short_definition: A linear differential equation with a non-zero term not involving the unknown function or its derivatives.

concepts.name: Separable DE
concepts.short_definition: A first-order ODE that can be written in the form f(y)dy = g(x)dx.

concepts.name: Exact DE
concepts.short_definition: A first-order ODE of the form M(x,y)dx + N(x,y)dy = 0 where ∂M/∂y = ∂N/∂x.

concepts.name: Integrating Factor
concepts.short_definition: A function that, when multiplied by a non-exact differential equation, makes it exact.

concepts.name: Linear First Order DE
concepts.short_definition: A first-order ODE of the form y' + p(x)y = q(x).

concepts.name: Homogeneous Linear DE with Constant Coefficients
concepts.short_definition: A homogeneous linear ODE where coefficients are constants.

concepts.name: Characteristic Equation
concepts.short_definition: A polynomial equation derived from a homogeneous linear DE with constant coefficients.

concepts.name: Roots of Characteristic Equation
concepts.short_definition: The solutions to the characteristic equation.

concepts.name: Complex Roots
concepts.short_definition: Roots of the characteristic equation that are complex numbers.

concepts.name: Repeated Roots
concepts.short_definition: Roots of the characteristic equation that appear more than once.

concepts.name: Method of Undetermined Coefficients
concepts.short_definition: A method to find a particular solution for non-homogeneous linear DEs with specific forms of the non-homogeneous term.

concepts.name: Method of Variation of Parameters
concepts.short_definition: A method to find a particular solution for non-homogeneous linear DEs, applicable to a wider range of non-homogeneous terms.

concepts.name: Wronskian
concepts.short_definition: A determinant used to check for linear independence of solutions to a homogeneous linear DE.

concepts.name: Cauchy-Euler Equation
concepts.short_definition: A second-order linear ODE of the form ax^2y'' + bxy' + cy = 0.

concepts.name: Laplace Transform
concepts.short_definition: An integral transform used to convert differential equations into algebraic equations.

concepts.name: Inverse Laplace Transform
concepts.short_definition: The operation that converts an algebraic equation back into the solution of the differential equation.

concepts.name: Series Solution
concepts.short_definition: Finding solutions to differential equations in the form of an infinite series.

concepts.name: Frobenius Method
concepts.short_definition: A method for finding series solutions of second-order linear ODEs around regular singular points.

concepts.name: Existence and Uniqueness Theorem
concepts.short_definition: A theorem that guarantees the existence and uniqueness of a solution to an initial value problem under certain conditions.

concepts.name: Numerical Methods for DEs
concepts.short_definition: Approximation techniques for solving differential equations when analytical solutions are difficult or impossible.

concepts.name: Euler's Method
concepts.short_definition: A simple first-order numerical method for approximating solutions to ODEs.

concepts.name: Runge-Kutta Methods
concepts.short_definition: A family of iterative methods for approximating the solutions of ordinary differential equations.
